hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in /Users/t45k/prog/askin/.claude/worktrees/*) exit 0 ;; /Users/t45k/prog/askin-*) exit 0 ;; /Users/t45k/prog/askin/*) printf '%s\n' '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Editing files inside the primary repo at /Users/t45k/prog/askin is blocked. Work inside a git worktree (.claude/worktrees/<name> or askin-<name>)."}'; exit 0 ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; }

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[^a-zA-Z0-9_])git[[:space:]]+(commit|push)([[:space:]]|$)' || exit 0; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; git fetch origin main >/dev/null 2>&1 && git merge origin/main --no-edit >/dev/null 2>&1 || { printf '%s\n' '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"git fetch/merge origin/main failed before commit/push. Resolve conflicts (or other issues) before retrying."}'; exit 0; }

jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.kt|*.kts|*.md|*.json|*.toml|*.xml|*.yml|*.yaml|*.gradle|*.properties|*.txt|*.gitignore|*.gitattributes|*.lock|*.cfg|*.conf|*.ini|*.sh) [ -f "$f" ] && [ -n "$(tail -c 1 "$f")" ] && printf '\n' >> "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null; true
root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$root" ] && cd "$root" && git fetch origin main >/dev/null 2>&1 && git merge --ff-only origin/main >/dev/null 2>&1; true
